welcome.title: Welcome to VoteChain
welcome.body: VoteChain lets your community create proposals, vote with token weight, and execute decisions — all transparently on the Stellar blockchain.

connect-wallet.title: Connect your wallet
connect-wallet.body: Connect a Stellar-compatible wallet (e.g. Freighter) to interact with governance. Your vote weight equals your governance token balance.

create-proposal.title: Create a proposal
create-proposal.body: Any address can submit a proposal. Provide a title, description, quorum threshold, and voting duration in seconds.

cast-vote.title: Cast your vote
cast-vote.body: During the active voting window, cast Yes, No, or Abstain. Each address may vote exactly once per proposal.

lifecycle.title: Proposal lifecycle
lifecycle.body: After the voting period ends, anyone can finalise the proposal. It passes when total_votes ≥ quorum AND yes > no, then an admin can execute it.

done.title: You're ready to govern
done.body: You can revisit this tutorial at any time from the Help menu.

glossary.proposal: An on-chain governance item with a title, description, quorum requirement, and fixed voting window. Any address may create one.
glossary.quorum: The minimum total votes required for a proposal to be valid.
glossary.vote-weight: The number of governance tokens held by a voter at the time of voting.
glossary.abstain: A vote choice that counts toward quorum but neither supports nor opposes the proposal.
glossary.finalise: Closing a proposal after its voting period expires. The contract then marks it Passed or Rejected.
glossary.execute: Admin action that marks a Passed proposal as Executed.
glossary.cancel: Admin action that stops an Active proposal before its voting window ends.
glossary.lifecycle: Active → Passed/Rejected → Executed, or Active → Cancelled.
